Spright
Trailer Gameplay Media World Updates Follow

Spright

Wishlist on Steam

A crownlit action-platformer of swift movement, spectral gates, and boss-sized danger.

Dash through atmospheric biomes, crack open Spirit Seal Gates, collect blueprints, and battle strange bosses in a hand-crafted indie adventure built for speed, impact, and replayable challenge.

Gameplay

Fast, readable action with sharp risk and reward.

Spright blends platforming, close-range combat, permanent upgrades, and challenge gates into rooms built for momentum.

Fluid traversal

Chain jumps, dashes, air movement, and biome-specific traversal as each area bends the rules beneath your feet.

Impact combat

Slash through threats, slam with a hammer, deflect projectiles, and manage invulnerability windows when fights get crowded.

Spirit Seal Gates

Activate trial gates for timed, no-hit, or enemy-wave challenges that lock the room and pay out only when you hold your nerve.

Blueprint upgrades

Collect crowns, coins, and blueprints to expand survivability and experiment with risky power modifiers.

Built for spectacle

Every region pushes a different mood.

From ruined halls lit by amber dust to spacebound platforms and deep sea pressure zones, Spright uses dramatic environments as more than scenery. They frame hazards, bosses, traversal, and the next reason to press forward.

  • Industrial cityscapes and mechanical arenas
  • Deep sea currents, pressure, and aquatic combat
  • High-contrast ruins made for trailer-ready boss moments

Media

Screenshots, key art, and enemies.

A curated look at Spright's current visual identity using the game's own PNG assets.

About Spright

Reclaim power from rooms that fight back.

Spright is an atmospheric indie action-platformer starring a flame-headed warrior moving through dangerous biomes, sealed arenas, and boss encounters. The game centers on responsive traversal, melee pressure, crown-based health, coins, blueprint upgrades, and choices that can change how the world reacts.

It is built in Godot with a strong focus on cinematic lighting, pixel-forward characters, and punchy room-scale challenges.

★ Wishlist Spright

Latest Updates

What's changing in Spright.

Recent development notes pulled from the same update log used by the in-game menu.

Update Log Updated 2026-05-17

Pressure-current caves

Added pressure-current caves in the Deep Sea biome with drifting enemies and collapsing coral tunnels.

Aerial momentum rework

Reworked aerial movement so chained dashes carry more momentum through combat rooms.

Spirit Seal Gate variants

New Spirit Seal Gate variants now include survival waves, precision platform routes, and no-hit arena trials.

Blueprint modifiers

Added blueprint modifiers that trade survivability for higher crown payout and faster movement speed.

Enemy stagger readability

Updated enemy stagger reactions to improve combat readability during crowded encounters.

Ember Cavern expansion

Expanded Ember Cavern with lava lift machinery, heat vents, and hidden traversal shortcuts.

Phase-evolving boss hazards

Boss arenas now feature biome-specific hazards that evolve between phases.

Controller responsiveness

Improved controller responsiveness and reduced input buffering during hammer slam recovery.

Follow the game

Wishlist the game, follow development updates, and join the community channels.
